title: PM Work-Package Write Surface (Minimal)
objective: Implement the first bounded work-package write runtime slice by adding create and update contracts, minimal mutation services, and POST/PATCH endpoints for work.work_packages only, reusing the existing FK-validation pattern from packet 011f and preserving all non-project, non-work-package PM entities as read-only.
constrained_outputs: Create and update schemas for work.work_packages only
Minimal mutation services and router wiring for POST and PATCH work-package endpoints
Validation behavior for the active org and identity FK references consumed by work packages
Focused regression evidence proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-012f, packet-012h, and packet-012i surfaces remain intact after the minimal work-package write addition
validation_steps: Confirm packet 013 adds write runtime support for work.work_packages only and does not broaden mutation scope to tasks, assignments, dependencies, execution issues, or progress snapshots
Confirm the minimal work-package write surface reuses the existing FK-validation posture for active org and identity references without authoring new SQL or schema changes
Confirm no new read-schema expansion is introduced beyond the existing work-package contracts

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-012f identity joined-read tests, packet-012h org joined-read tests, packet-012i org integration smoke, and any new work-package write tests pass after the write-surface addition
sql_permission_note: Packet 013 is runtime write-surface work only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, or broader mutation-scope expansion are authorized.
